title: Bullseye Lantern
excerpt: A Bullseye Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast bright_light Light in a 60-foot Cone and dim_light Light for an additional 60 feet....
markdown:
# Bullseye Lantern

A Bullseye Lantern burns Oil as fuel to cast [[bright_light Light]] in a 60-foot Cone and [[dim_light Light]] for an additional 60 feet.
